caption: A man and a woman stand in a professional studio setting featuring white walls and a white floor. To the left, a man in a dark suit stands by a white pedestal table, while a woman in a dark blazer and light-colored trousers stands behind another white pedestal table in the center. A second man, wearing a camouflage-patterned shirt and dark trousers, stands to the right near a third white pedestal table. Each table is equipped with a microphone. In the background, a blue and white banner contains the text "PRAKTIJK EN ZORGVRAAG" and a large image of hands. The "mediasite" logo is visible at the top of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains stationary, while the man in the suit gestures slightly with his hand. The man in the camouflage shirt shifts his position, moving closer to the center of the frame and adjusting his stance.
